title: Umami Chewy Nostalgic Turkish Cream Cheese Stir-fry
description: A hearty and umami-rich dish featuring chewy cream cheese as the star ingredient in a light broil-based stir-fry that transports you to nostalgic Turkish cuisine.

ingredients.name: onion
ingredients.notes: finely chopped to enhance the dish's texture and taste

ingredients.name: bell peppers
ingredients.notes: slivered to match the texture of cream cheese

instructions: Preheat your oven to broil setting.
Chop the chicken breast into small, bite-sized pieces and finely chop the onion. Slit each bell pepper into thin strips.
Mix minced garlic with olive oil and sprinkle over the chopped ingredients (chicken, onion, and bell peppers). Season lightly with salt and black pepper.
Transfer the seasoned mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Spread out evenly to create uniform pieces for better broiling. Broil until golden brown spots appear on top, about 10 minutes.
In another pan, melt cream cheese over low heat while adding lemon juice and tomato paste. Stir well until fully combined into a smooth sauce.
Drizzle the creamy sauce over the toasted chicken mixture and serve immediately.
